title: Sumerian/Akkadian: Royal Annals of Shalmaneser III
description: From the Sumerian/Akkadian corpus: Royal Annals of Shalmaneser III.
introduction: From the Sumerian/Akkadian corpus: Royal Annals of Shalmaneser III.

translation.text: From 'Royal Annals of Shalmaneser III': One of the 117 major literary works of ancient Mesopotamia, recorded on clay tablets in cuneiform script and preserved in the great libraries of Sumer, Akkad, Babylon, and Assyria.
